content.problemStatement:
You are given an array AAA of NNN integers, and a positive parameter XXX.

You may perform the following action as many times as you want (possibly 000):


Choose iii (1‚Č§i‚Č§N)(1 \le i \le N)(1‚Č§i‚Č§N) and modify AiA_iAi‚Äč to Ai+XA_i + XAi‚Äč+X.
Find the minimum possible value of A1‚äēA2‚äē‚Ä¶‚äēANA_1 \oplus A_2 \oplus \ldots \oplus A_NA1‚Äč‚äēA2‚Äč‚äē‚Ä¶‚äēAN‚Äč at the end of the actions, where ‚äē\oplus‚äē denotes the Bitwise XOR operator.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of multiple lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains NNN and XXX - the size of the array, and the parameter.
The second line contains NNN integers - A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč.




Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the minimum value of  A1‚äēA2‚äē‚Ä¶‚äēANA_1 \oplus A_2 \oplus \ldots \oplus A_NA1‚Äč‚äēA2‚Äč‚äē‚Ä¶‚äēAN‚Äč after performing some actions.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 2‚čÖ1052 \cdot 10^52‚čÖ105.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 1 : Add X=2X = 2X=2 to A1A_1A1‚Äč 505050 times. This changes the array AAA to [101,100][101, 100][101,100], and 101‚äē100=1101 \oplus 100 = 1101‚äē100=1.
Test Case 2 : A1‚äēA2‚äēA3=1‚äē2‚äē3=0A_1 \oplus A_2 \oplus A_3 = 1 \oplus 2 \oplus 3 = 0A1‚Äč‚äēA2‚Äč‚äēA3‚Äč=1‚äē2‚äē3=0 already before any actions.
